caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVE DO SHIT" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall adorned with several framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white garment. To the right, clothing racks are visible. In the bottom corners of the scene, logos for "THE" and "BOOST REALLY" are displayed. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his hands, his facial expression shifting from a focused gaze to a slight smile. His head moves slightly and his mouth opens and closes in coordination with his speech. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, focusing on the man from the chest up.
